steps.t: Tekâmi has asked you to go to Khanâg Gur and speak with their leader on her behalf about the possibility of a business partnership.
You went to Khanâg Gur to ask Halshûm if he wanted to do business with Tekâmi. He did not, but he will find someone who does if you do something for h…
You went to Khanâg Gur to ask Halshûm if he wanted to do business with Tekâmi. He did not, but he will find someone who does if you do something for h…
After helping Halshûm, he gave you the name of a merchant in Zajâna, Zarzûmir, who will do business with Tekâmi. He did not want the Ordâkhai rations …
After helping Halshûm, he gave you the name of a merchant in Zajâna, Zarzûmir, who will do business with Tekâmi. You first gave the Ordâkhai rations t…
You met with Zarzûmir in Zajâna, and he agreed to trade with Tekâmi. You should return to Jiret-menêsh and tell Tekâmi of your success.
